title: Way Much Faster Oxidize
description: Copper oxidizes faster when next to water
body:
# What it dose?
Ever feel that copper oxidation is too slow? Want to use oxidized copper as a building material but lack the time?  
This mod provides a completely new oxidation mechanism for copper: **water**.  
When a copper block comes in contact with water, it oxidizes more rapidly, regardless of whether there are other copper blocks around.  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmyM5abs/images/cea0668589b045ca9cf6192e68516d23c7709569.jpeg)
